findings.detection: Implemented absolute latest image date detection in GEE using spatial filtering over the India bounding box, resolving GEE search timeout errors.
findings.backward_search_handling: Configured query date range extension backwards by lookback_days (default 7 days). This allows server-side sorting and nearest valid pixel selection (via ee.Reducer.first) to automatically pick the closest cloud-free observation.
findings.provenance_fields: Integrated `{feature} Publication Lag` columns into OUTPUT_COLUMNS (sentinel5p_collector.py), SATELLITE_RENAME_MAP and SATELLITE_METADATA_FEATURES (merger.py), and numeric_cols (dataset_validator.py). Added mapping from `Pub Lag Days` to `Publication Lag` to guarantee clean propagation.
findings.regeneration: Successfully executed the full satellite collector, integration, dataset preparation, and ML training pipelines for the target date 2026-07-07 with lookback=14. The updated dataset now contains 84 rows and 58 columns (including the 6 new publication lag columns). All validators and downstream training tasks passed without errors.
